questions.question_text_full: Select the set of classes the relationship among which is best illustrated by the following Venn diagram. [Figure: Concentric circles]
questions.notes: The options are labeled a, b, c, d in the image, mapped to 1, 2, 3, 4 respectively.

questions.question_text_full: Select the combination of letters that when sequentially placed in the blanks of the given series will complete the series. _ Z _ C _ L Z _ C _ L _ X _ V L _ _ _ V

options.text: L, X, V, V, X, C, X, Z, Z
L, X, C, X, V, C, Z, C, Z, C
X, Z, L, X, V, Z, C, C, C, L
L, X, V, X, V, Z, C, Z, X, C

questions.notes: The options are labeled a, b, c, d in the image, mapped to 1, 2, 3, 4 respectively.

warnings: Question 22 is cut off at the bottom of the page and does not contain options.
